utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 main items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Now checking the final property solution: (1) property — fully detailed with type, price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, features, and viewing_date. (2) financing — includes method, backup_option, interest_rate, term, fees, currency, and approval_status. (3) legal_services — includes cost, currency, status, service_level. (4) moving_services — includes cost, currency, service_level, includes, and status. (5) setup_services — includes utility_setup and property_survey with costs, currency, status, and services. (6) total_budget — includes all cost components, grand_total, currency, within_budget flag, and range. All six items are present and fully specified with details as required.

In the ground-truth list of purchase properties, the closest match in type (family home purchase) and price range is 'Family House' (CAD $650K, rating 10), as the other options are either much cheaper, much more expensive, or less suitable for a family of four. The financing method selected is 'cash_purchase_capability' with a backup 'mortgage' and a processing fee of CAD $1200, which aligns with the 'Cash Purchase' option (rating 5) and the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 9) from purchase financing. The legal service cost is CAD $1200 with 'premium' level, corresponding to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The property survey cost is CAD $650, matching 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9). The moving service cost is CAD $1200 with 'premium_family_relocation' and white-glove service, corresponding to 'Premium Moving' (rating 9). The utility setup cost is CAD $120, corresponding to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6). Therefore, the final mapped ratings are: Family House (10), Cash Purchase (5), Premium Legal Package (9), Full Structural Survey (9), Premium Moving (9), and Basic Utilities (6).
